title: The Last Lightkeeper’s Map
originalityStatement: A held-out original story fixture authored for forward evaluation; no intended pattern IDs are stored with the input.

storyModel.premise: A replacement lightkeeper reaches an island station whose signal shutters, tide paths, and three residents disagree about the final evacuation night.
storyModel.playerRole: Replacement lightkeeper with incomplete handover notes

knowledge: The final signal was not witnessed
The shutters behaved differently during the evacuation

revealOrder: The shutters alter which tide route is visible
The residents remember different parts of the evacuation
The record proves why the former keeper left
endingConstraints: The former keeper's choice remains voluntary
The youngest resident is not rewritten as a witness
interactionOpportunities: Compare tide access in two weather states
Ask residents about consequences they personally witnessed
Read the evacuation record after both observations
protectedCanon: The former lightkeeper chose to leave
The youngest resident never witnessed the final signal
The evacuation record is revealed after the shutters are operated in two weather states

acceptanceCriteria: The player can explain the shutter-to-tide rule
No selected pattern changes protected canon

productProfile.spatialBudget: island hub, lighthouse, three homes, two tide layers
